title: Receiving email notifications in Monday
excerpt:
If I setup multiple email addresses for different staff members, and they each send emails to clients from Monday, is there a way that only the person who sent the email can be notified when there’s a reply? 
For example…

posts.author: asktiedavis (Tieshena Davis)
posts.cookedHtml:
If I setup multiple email addresses for different staff members, and they each send emails to clients from Monday, is there a way that only the person who sent the email can be notified when there’s a reply?

For example: If I setup an email for trish@xxx, and Trish sends the client an email from Monday, will she be the only person to receive a reply notification (or) will I also receive it since I’m the person that setup the email account?

Thanks!

posts.author: asktiedavis (Tieshena Davis)
posts.cookedHtml: Platform discussions Hello! I posted this question over a year ago, and didn’t receive a reply. Can someone help me? Thanks!
